sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 53:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 53:1
items.html: A great will to receive with a great yearning is called “great coarseness,” and little yearning is called “little coarseness.” It is the vessel for drawing the abundance in every Partzuf, and is therefore called the “internality” of the vessel.
